nodes.name: 18.1.story.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-018 Story 18.1 (Complete). Redesign rankings page with sortable/filterable table: add conference filter dropdown (Power 5, Group of 5, FBS, FCS categories), sortable columns (rank, team, conference, ELO, record, trend), row hover highlighting, and responsive mobile layout. Frontend-only change to frontend/rankings.html using vanilla JS DOM manipulation and existing /api/rankings endpoint.

nodes.name: 20.1.story.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-020 Story 20.1 (Complete). Reposition predictions section below rankings table on the homepage by reordering HTML div elements in index.html. Pure structural change with no JavaScript or API modifications required.

nodes.name: 20.2.story.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-020 Story 20.2 (Complete). Sort prediction cards by highest team rating (Math.max(home_team_rating, away_team_rating) descending) in the loadPredictions() JavaScript function. Ensures top-ranked matchups appear first for better UX.

nodes.name: 20.3.story.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-020 Story 20.3 (Optional). Add ranking badges (e.g., #3) to prediction cards by cross-referencing the /api/rankings endpoint. Badges display the team's current rank if they are ranked in the top 25. Frontend enhancement to index.html prediction cards.

nodes.name: 21.1.story.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-021 Story 21.1 (Complete). Add 8 nullable quarter score columns (home_q1–q4, away_q1–q4) to the Game model in src/models/models.py, create Alembic migration, add get_game_line_scores() method to CFBDClient calling /games/teams CFBD endpoint, and add validation to ensure quarter scores sum to final score. Foundation for quarter-weighted ELO garbage time detection.

nodes.name: 21.2.story.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-021 Story 21.2 (Complete). Implement quarter-weighted ELO margin-of-victory adjustment with garbage time detection in ranking_service.py. If score differential after Q3 exceeds GARBAGE_TIME_THRESHOLD (21 points), Q4 score contribution is weighted at GARBAGE_TIME_Q4_WEIGHT (0.25). Produces more accurate ELO ratings by reducing impact of garbage-time scoring.

nodes.name: 21.3.story.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-021 Story 21.3 (Complete). Create backfill_quarter_scores.py script with --dry-run, --season, and --limit flags to import historical quarter scores from CFBD API. Also generate a ranking comparison report (compare_rankings_pre_post.py) to quantify ELO changes between old and new quarter-weighted calculations. Includes rate limiting for CFBD API calls.

nodes.name: 22.1.story.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-022 Story 22.1 (Complete). Add game_type VARCHAR(50) nullable field to Game model + Alembic migration, add season_type='postseason' parameter support to CFBD client, and create import_conference_championships() function. Enables storing and distinguishing conference championship games from regular season games.

nodes.name: 22.2.story.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-022 Story 22.2 (Complete). Display gold 'CONF CHAMP' badge on team schedule pages for conference championship games. Badge follows existing .fcs-badge CSS pattern using FFD700 gold color. Frontend change to team detail schedule rendering in JavaScript.

nodes.name: 22.3.story.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-022 Story 22.3 (Complete). Apply standard ELO calculations to conference championship games, fix Week 15 ranking save bug, add shutout score filter (exclude 0-0 games), and fix cumulative wins/losses record calculation bug. Ensures conference championships contribute properly to team ELO ratings.

nodes.name: 24.1.story.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-024 Story 24.1 (Complete). Create fix_2025_records.py script to recalculate team wins/losses using only 2025 season games, fixing cross-season record contamination bug where prior season game results carried over. Corrects displayed win/loss records for all teams in the current season.

nodes.name: 25.1.story.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-025 Story 25.1 (Complete). Investigate and document CFBD API returning production endpoint: the API returns percentPPA field as a decimal (0.0–1.0), NOT the 'returningProduction' field name. Corrects the field mapping in cfbd_client.py to use percentPPA and documents the correct API schema for returning production data.

nodes.name: 25.3.story.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-025 Story 25.3 (Complete). Verify returning production import pipeline: confirmed 133 FBS teams imported with 100% data coverage, values ranging 2.5%–92.4%. Validates that percentPPA field mapping fix from story 25.1 produces correct results across the full team dataset.

nodes.name: 25.4.story.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-025 Story 25.4 (Complete). Create RETURNING-PRODUCTION.md documentation file explaining the returning production metric, its source (CFBD percentPPA field), how it is stored and used in preseason ELO calculations, and import instructions. Part of the documentation epic for the returning production feature.

nodes.name: 26.8.story.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-026 Story 26.8 (Completed 2026-05-01). Validates star-based transfer portal team rankings against 247Sports expert rankings for 2024 season. Spearman rank correlation of ~0.52 (moderate alignment). Key finding: our algorithm is quantity-focused (rewards transfer volume), 247Sports is quality-focused (rewards 4★/5★ transfers). Decision made to retain current algorithm due to volume's real ELO impact and 88.7% star data coverage. Comparison utility at utilities/compare_transfer_rankings.py.

nodes.name: 28.1.story.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-028 Story 28.1 (Complete). Create CONTRIBUTING.md and DEVELOPMENT.md developer onboarding documentation covering local setup, environment configuration, test running, and contribution workflow. Zero-risk documentation-only change with no code modifications.

nodes.name: 28.2.story.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-028 Story 28.2 (Complete). Create CODING-STANDARDS.md documentation, add pyproject.toml with Black and isort configuration (line-length=88, profile=black), create .flake8 config, and add requirements-dev.txt with development tooling. Establishes code quality toolchain configuration.

nodes.name: 28.3.story.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-028 Story 28.3 (Complete). Add comprehensive Google-style docstrings to all core modules: main.py (20+ endpoints), ranking_service.py (15+ methods), models.py (10+ classes), schemas.py (8+ schemas), database.py (3+ functions), cfbd_client.py (8+ methods). Enables auto-generated OpenAPI documentation and IDE support.

nodes.name: 28.4.story.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-028 Story 28.4 (Complete). Run isort on all Python files to standardize import statement ordering: 54 root-level .py files, 20 files in scripts/, and the tests/ directory. Uses isort with profile=black configuration for compatibility with Black formatter.

nodes.name: 28.5.story.md
nodes.summary: EPIC-028 Story 28.5 (Complete). Reorganize project files by moving migrate_add_*.py scripts to migrations/ directory, and moving check_*.py, debug_*.py, diagnose_*.py scripts to diagnostics/ directory using git mv to preserve history. Improves project structure and separates concerns.
